relations.note: The styling applies specifically to the copy lockup defined in the companion campaign rule.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain regulatory/MLR consistency for the primary campaign claim.
rules.rule_text: The campaign lockup must use the exact verbatim phrasing: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.'

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency and thematic brand connection to dermatomyositis 'd' and 'm'.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in Agenda (font.family.agenda = Agenda), falling back to Nunito Sans (font.stack.email) in email, in ALL CAPS, left-aligned (alignment.campaign.headline_lockup = left-aligned), and stacked in three lines in hero placements. The letters 'D' and 'M' must use a 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of the main headline color.
